description.value:
You channel the bizarre powers that exist beyond the outer reaches of the universe, dealing 3d12 mental damage to each creature in the area as phantasmal claws, jaws, and tentacles lash out at each target. Each creature in the area must attempt a Will save. The area is difficult terrain for any creature sickened by the effects of this spell.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d12.

You force the target to see a vision of its own death. It takes 8d6 mental damage with a Will save. If the target is reduced to 0 HP by this spell, its vision becomes reality and kills it instantly.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage, is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 4} and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Fleeing] for as long as it's frightened.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

You burden a creature's body and mind with the pains and sorrows of a lifetime. The target takes 3d8 bludgeoning damage and 3d8 mental damage and must attempt a Will saving throw.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Encumbered] for 1 round.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage and is encumbered for 1 minute.

Heightened (+1) The mental damage increases by 2d8.

You unleash a ray of entropy that rapidly and indiscriminately decays matter. Make a ranged spell attack against the target's AC. On a hit, the target takes 5d8 void damage, or it takes 2d6 persistent acid damage and is glitching 1 if it has the tech trait. On a critical hit, double the damage, and if the creature has the tech trait, it's glitching 2 and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Stunned]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1 die.

You refract latent energy from the Dimension of Time into your current plane in the form of a massive blade. The blade deals 5d6 slashing damage to all creatures in the area as it causes time to pass rapidly in a thin slice of their bodies. Creatures in the area must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

The target hears ominous sounds containing unspeakable mysteries from beyond the stars that disorient its mind. The target attempts a Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The target hears the strange whispers, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Failure The target begins to wander aimlessly, using each action to Step in a random direction. When it moves, the target takes the safest route and doesn't enter hazardous terrain. The spell has a duration of 1 minute or until a creature uses a hostile action against the target.

Critical Failure As failure, except the target babbles incoherently. Any creature that begins its turn within 20 feet of the target must attempt a Will saving throw. On a failure, it must use its first action on its next turn to Step in a random direction and becomes immune to this spell for 24 hours. This is an incapacitation effect.

You drive mental contamination from the target's mind. Attempt to counteract an effect of your choice imposing one of these conditions on the target: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Fleeing], @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Frightened], and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Stupefied]. If you failed to counteract the effect but you would have if its counteract rank were 2 lower, instead suppress the effect until the beginning of your next turn. The effect's duration doesn't elapse while it's suppressed. This spell can't counteract or suppress conditions that are part of curses, diseases, or a natural state of the target.

Heightened (4th) Add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Confused], @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Controlled], and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Slowed] to the list of conditions.

Heightened (6th) As 4th rank, plus add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Doomed].

Heightened (8th) As 4th rank, plus add doomed and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Stunned].

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

target.value: 1 spell effect or unattended magic item

description.value:
Your gaze pierces through illusions and finds @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Invisible] creatures and spirits. You can see invisible creatures as though they weren't invisible, although their features are blurred, making them @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Concealed] and difficult to identify. You can also see incorporeal creatures, like ghosts, phased through an object from within 10 feet of an object's surface as blurry shapes seen through those objects. Subtler clues also grant you a +2 status bonus to checks you make to disbelieve illusions.

Heightened (5th) This spell has a duration of 8 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.Spell Effect: See the Unseen]

You send a surge of healing energy to restore the target's body. Attempt to counteract an effect of your choice imposing one of these conditions on the target: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Blinded], @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Dazzled], @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Deafened], @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Enfeebled], or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Sickened]. If you didn't counteract the effect, but you would have if its counteract rank were 2 lower, instead suppress the effect until the beginning of your next turn. The effect's duration doesn't elapse while it's suppressed.

This spell can't counteract or suppress curses, diseases, or conditions that are part of the target's normal state.

Heightened (4th) Add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Drained] and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Slowed] to the list of conditions.

Heightened (6th) As 4th rank, plus add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Petrified].

Heightened (8th) As 4th rank, plus add petrified and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Stunned].

You dull the target's mind, depending on its Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} until the start of your next turn.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2} for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 3} for 1 minute.

The target can understand the meaning of a single language it is hearing or reading when you cast the spell. This doesn't let it understand codes, language couched in metaphor, and the like (subject to GM discretion). If the target can hear multiple languages and knows that, it can choose which language to understand; otherwise, choose one of the languages randomly.

Heightened (3rd) The target can also speak the language.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 10 creatures, and targets can also speak the language.

You ward an area to alert you when creatures enter without your permission. When you cast alarm, select a password. Whenever a Small or larger corporeal creature enters the spell's area without speaking the password, alarm sends your choice of a mental alert (in which case the spell gains the mental trait) or an audible alarm with the sound and volume of a hand bell (in which case the spell gains the auditory trait). Either option automatically awakens you, and the bell allows each creature in the area to attempt a @Check[perception|dc:15] check to wake up. A creature aware of the alarm must succeed at a Stealth check against the spell's DC or trigger the spell when moving into the area.

Heightened (3rd) You can specify a trigger for which types of creatures sound the alarm spell.

You push into the target's mind and daze it with a mental jolt. The jolt deals 1d6 mental damage, with a basic Will save. If the target critically fails the save, it is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Stunned]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

You unleash a swirling multitude of colors that overwhelms creatures based on their Will saves.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Dazzled] for 1 round.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Stunned]{Stunned 1}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Blinded] for 1 round, and dazzled for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature is stunned for 1 round and blinded for 1 minute.

You sap the target's strength, depending on its Fortitude save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 1} until the start of your next turn.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 2} for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 3} for 1 minute.

You plant fear in the target; it must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 3} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Fleeing] for 1 round.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to five creatures.

You manifest an injury from the future or past to harm a creature in the present. Choose bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage. The target takes 1d8 of the selected damage type with a basic Will save. If the target fails its save and then takes the same type of damage before the end of your next turn, it takes an additional @Damage[ceil((@item.level)/2)d4[persistent,bleed]] damage.

Heightened (+2) The initial damage increases by 1d8, and the persistent damage on a failure increases by 1d4.

You focus on the target object, opening your mind to perceive magical auras. When the casting is complete, you know whether that item is magical. You or anyone you advise about the aura gains a +2 circumstance bonus to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Identify Magic] on the item. If the object is illusory, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your read aura spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.Spell Effect: Read Aura]

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to 10 objects.

Heightened (6th) You can target any number of objects.

You hurl a loose, unattended object that is within range and that has 1 Bulk or less at the target. Make a spell attack roll against the target. If you hit, you deal 2d6 bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage—as appropriate for the object you hurled. No specific traits or magic properties of the hurled item affect the attack or the damage.

Critical Success You deal double damage.

Success You deal full damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

You call upon the Void to harm life force. The target takes 2d4 void damage with a basic Fortitude save. On a critical failure, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 1} until the start of your next turn.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.
@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ConstantSpells]

30 feet. The facets of Elovai's form reflect worrying glimpses of strange realities degrading away to nothing. A creature that can see who enters or begins its turn within the aura must attempt a @Check[will|dc:22] save. If it fails, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 2} on critical failure). A creature that succeeds on this save becomes immune to this aura for 1 hour.

Frequency once per round

Trigger Elovai is targeted by a ranged Strike or ranged spell attack

Requirements Elovai is aware of the attack and not @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Off-Guard] against it

Effect Elovai opens a faceted rift in space in the path of the projectile. Elovai gains a +4 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack. If this causes the attack to miss, she opens a matching rift near another creature within 60 feet of her and makes a ranged spell attack against that creature. Resolve the original attack or spell against the chosen creature based on the results of Elovai's spell attack.

Elovai manipulates space in higher dimensions to attack from unexpected directions. If her next action is to cast a spell with an area, range, or target, the spell manifests from one of her allies within 100 feet instead of herself. She uses the ally's space to determine the spell's source, range, and area of effect, but line of sight and line of effect must be met by both Elovai and her selected ally when the spell is cast.

publication.title: Starfinder Society Scenario #1-26: Final Gambit: Part Two
